output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?film WHERE {
  ?award rdfs:label "MTV Movie Award for Best New Filmmaker" @en .
  ?award wdt:P585 ?awardDate .
  FILTER(SUBSTR(STR(?awardDate) , 1 , 4) = "1999")
  ?person wdt:P166 ?award .
  ?film wdt:P57 ?person .
  ?film wdt:P170 ?person .
  ?film wdt:P577 ?released .
}
ORDER BY ?released
LIMIT 1
